creator: dougb@dougbarton.us
text:
Sorry, I wasn't clear about the resolution I was hoping to see. It's not 
Ok to simply mark them as conflicting with each other, as they are both 
needed for a common installation set:

pkg_info -R libspf2-1.2.9_1
Required by:
postfix-2.10.0,1

pkg_info -R p5-Mail-SPF-2.007
Required by:
p5-Mail-SpamAssassin-3.3.2_8

An appropriate fix for this situation would be to rename one or both of 
the installed spfquery binaries to a different name.

Doug
